description: None, as it was unable to convert our XML data into a usable file format. We went with a JSON export from our scheduling system instead, and piped it through a different data conversion tool.

cons: Limited to 50MB on free tier No pricing listed on website - have to contact for details Must provide email address instead of handling conversion in online session

cons: Their customer service is a little slow in responding but it is not something that affects me because when they respond to me they are friendly and have explained all my concerns in a very simple way.

review_title: Easy to break apart complex XML documents into CSV files for further processing.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The flexibility of the CSV output allows me to manipulate the data in Excel and reassemble XML into the format I need for my business. I also love being able to use it for free!
cons: Does not handle special characters well - when working with European languages, I had to do a lot of find/replace to restore special characters, and for Japanese, it was unusable.
author_profession: Senior Business Analyst / SalesForce Commerce Cloud Consultant

author: Najla A.
pros: Easy to use, it is very user-friendly for beginners! I recommend it for everyone
cons: Signing up process it is too long. It could be alot easier if I sign into my facebook or google+ accounts

review_title: I would like to setup wich parts of the tree in the XML structure to parse.
description: - Easy to use - Excellent performance - A clean and well structure output file
author: Eliezer M.
pros: The software it's very easy to use. Also, the ER diagram it's very helpful to understand the whole structure.
cons: I have a very complicated XML structure, and I don't want all the "branchs" of my json file. So it's would be great if I can "prune" some parts of the tree, before convert the file to a table.

review_title: It did exactly what it is described to do and what I wanted it to do.

cons: There is not much I can say that is negative about the product. The one point one could say is that the layout of the website isn't the greatest but that would be about it.
